response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including roles in developer tooling and leadership, but his background leans more heavily toward full-stack and mobile development rather than explicitly in build systems, testing infrastructure, or large-scale developer productivity. His technical leadership experience is strong, but his people management experience is less clearly detailed. His mobile platform knowledge is present but not emphasized.
strengths: Extensive experience in developer tooling and infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, CI/CD, GitLab setup)
Strong technical leadership across multiple domains (full-stack, mobile, embedded systems)
Experience with system design, architecture, and code review in high-performance environments
concerns: Limited explicit experience in build systems and testing infrastructure for large-scale mobile platforms
People management experience is not clearly quantified or highlighted
Mobile platform knowledge is present but not a core focus in recent roles
